narrative:
Concord Township has 606 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.7 percentage points.
